message:
test(vendored): add tiered_scrollback_status field to mux test fixtures

Add tiered_scrollback_status: None to all GetPaneRenderChangesResponse
constructor sites in mux_client.rs (22 sites) and mux_pool.rs (2 sites)
to match the new field added to the codec response struct.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
